host_adapters.summary: Syvert guardian result remains a retained host/repo-native action consumed by Loom as read-only evidence.

repo_native_carriers.summary: Syvert workflow and process docs remain repo-native governance carriers.
Syvert exec-plans remain repo-native recovery, review, merge-ready, and closeout carriers.
Syvert integration contract remains repo-owned and is consumed by review, guardian, and merge gates.

admission.summary: Compare Loom Work Item admission with Syvert Work Item entry discipline.

review.summary: Compare Loom review gate with Syvert review rubric and guardian split.

merge_ready.summary: Compare Loom merge-ready gate with Syvert guardian safe_to_merge discipline.

closeout.summary: Compare Loom closeout/reconciliation with Syvert Work Item and parent closeout practice.
